otherRequirements: Apply for an e-Tourist visa online before travel (30-day, 1-year or 5-year options)
Passport must have at least 6 months validity when you apply
Complete the online e-arrival card up to 72 hours before arrival
sourceNote: gov.uk India travel advice — a visa is required; e-Tourist visa available to UK nationals (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/india/entry-requirements). Per-stay cap modelled conservatively at 90 days; verify the exact option's terms.
